name: section_intro
label: Section Intro
default: Designed for professionals with 4+ years of experience in mining, energy, sustainability, policy or consulting who want to lead at the strategic level.

default.card_description: Senior manager or director in the extractive or processing industry, seeking to move from technical to strategic leadership. 8–15 years experience.
default.card_pills: Value chain strategy, Operations management, Leadership

default.card_description: ESG manager, policy advisor or regulator working on critical materials, energy transition or supply chain compliance. Needs business fluency.
default.card_pills: CRMA compliance, ESG reporting, EU policy

default.card_description: Strategy consultant or founder building ventures in the CRM space. Wants deep sectoral knowledge, a European network and access to investors.
default.card_pills: CRM ventures, Investor network, VC showcase
